aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO but lacks critical elements for strong search optimization.
quick_wins: Implement a Google Business Profile (GBP) to start building local search presence.
Add more detailed and unique content for each service to improve keyword targeting.
Encourage customers to leave reviews to build credibility and improve local search rankings.

gbp_analysis.summary: No Google Business Profile (GBP) was found, which is crucial for local search visibility.
critical_issues: Lack of GBP means the business is missing out on local search traffic.
No customer reviews or ratings to build trust and credibility.

nap_citations.summary: NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) consistency is unclear without a GBP or other citations.
action_items: Create and verify a GBP to establish a primary source of NAP information.
Audit and ensure NAP consistency across all online directories and platforms.
List the business in local directories and industry-specific websites.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of local search optimization and customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local appliance or HVAC services in San Diego.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Setting up a GBP and encouraging customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, localized content and building backlinks from local businesses and directories.

page_title: HVAC & Home Appliance Repair Services | Big City
